channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Beterbiev vs Bivol 2 LIVE: Fight stream, live updates, cheapest PPV deals, how to watch light-heavyweight title rematch
item.description: The Russians meet again in Saudi Arabia – here are the best streams, the cheapest prices and how to watch Artur Beterbiev vs Dmitry Bivol live online.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Handmaid's Tale season 6: everything we know so far about the hit Hulu show’s return
item.description: The Handmaid's Tale season 6 will be available to stream on Hulu in April 2025 – here's everything we know about the dystopian drama's return, while we wait.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Brazil Supreme Court justice orders Rumble suspension nationwide for alleged non-compliance
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — A Brazilian Supreme Court justice on Friday ordered the suspension of video-sharing platform Rumble in the South American nation for allegedly refusing to comply with court orders.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: CrowdStrike's $32M IRS Deal Faces Investigation
item.description: US feds investigate CrowdStrike's deal with Carahsoft for IRS cybersecurity tools, which the agency never used or purchased.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: This is the weirdest laptop I've ever seen and it reminds me of an often-mocked, thoroughly misunderstood Toshiba notebook
item.description: The Bapaco is a a Windows 11 laptop that's also a display and keyboard for Windows, macOS and Android.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Apple drops encryption feature for UK users after government reportedly demanded backdoor access
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple said Friday it will stop offering an advanced data security option for British users after the government reportedly demanded that the company provide backdoor access for any data those users have stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Fitbit Sleep Lab leaked – new feature could give you personalized bedtime recommendations
item.description: Fitbit could be getting a new Sleep Lab feature that can give you personalized sleep schedule recommendations.
item.dc:creator: stephen.warwick@futurenet.com (Stephen Warwick), TechRadar

item.title: Leaked Nothing Phone 3a and 3a Pro renders tease a mid-range phone that should have Samsung worried
item.description: Thanks to a leaked render, we could have our first proper look at the Nothing Phone 3a and 3a Pro – and even by looks alone, they seem to be worthy challengers for Samsung’s mid-range Galaxy handsets.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia's RTX 5000 GPUs continue to face severe supply issues, with RTX 5070 Ti reportedly being even worse for launch stock than the RTX 5080
item.description: Nvidia's RTX 5000 GPU launch is getting worse every day, it seems, as new reports indicate the RTX 5070 Ti is facing dire supply shortages.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: AI humanoid robots inch their way toward the workforce
item.description: AI-based humanoid robots could soon start becoming a workforce reality, thanks to parallel advances in generative AI and electromechanical components and mechatronics, enabling robots to have reasoning skills as well as physical abilities that exceed their predecessors.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Better student housing with a unified data platform
item.description: At the end of 2023, Chicago-based Article Student Living was acquired by a global real estate investment company, which allowed the business to expand, and enabled it to make key investments in the high-demand student housing market.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Grok 3 model puts xAI at the top tier of frontier model developers
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Steve Jobs a perfect choice for California’s $1 innovation coin
item.description: An iconic image of the late co-founder of Apple will be featured on the coin, which is expected to be released next year.
item.dc:creator: Sal Pizarro, The Mercury News

item.title: Musk calls former International Space Station commander 'idiot' in exchange over astronauts
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk called a former commander of the International Space Station an “idiot” on Thursday after he pushed back on Musk’s claim that the Biden administration “left” two astronauts in space “for political reasons.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Charred EV batteries from California wildfires spark concern about toxic waste contaminating drinking water
item.description: A water agency in charge of ground water for 2 million L.A. County residents has several concerns about hazardous waste processing from the Eaton fire.
item.dc:creator: Steve Scauzillo, The Mercury News

item.title: Everything we know about Apple’s C1 5G modem in iPhone 16e
item.description: There’s a lot to like about Apple’s newest $599 iPhone 16e, but one of the more interesting features in the device is the Apple-designed 5G modem. Apple has spent at least seven years developing the chip, but gave it just a few short seconds of time when it announced the smartphone this week.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: OSINT Unveiled: The Technology Behind the Intelligence – ODNI Edition
item.description: Learn how OSINT is shaping the future of intelligence and security. The post OSINT Unveiled: The Technology Behind the Intelligence – ODNI Edition first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Ex-OpenAI CTO Mira Murati launches AI startup, recruits top talent from rivals
item.description: Former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati has launched an AI startup, Thinking Machines Lab, escalating the fight for top talent and reshaping competition in the fast-evolving sector.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple introduces the iPhone 16e, a fast and powerful mid-range smartphone
item.description: Apple’s new iPhone 16e combines three innovations in one $599 package: an A18 chip, Apple’s fast smartphone processor; Apple Intelligence, the company’s private-by-design take on artificial intelligence; and the C1, Apple’s first-ever 5G radio.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Smart home device maker exposes 2.7 billion records in huge data breach
item.description: Major IoT data breach: Mars Hydro database with 2.7 billion records exposed. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says the breach is a reminder of the risks that come with using IoT devices.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A top Chinese official tours Thai-Myanmar border to highlight crackdown on scam centers
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Efforts to shut down online scam centers in Myanmar appeared to gain momentum on Monday as a top Chinese security official visited both sides of the Thai-Myanmar border ahead of expected large-scale repatriations of workers in the illicit industry.
item.dc:creator: JINTAMAS SAKSORNCHAI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Large language models: The foundations of generative AI
item.description: Large language models (LLMs) such as GPT, Bard, and Llama have caught the public’s imagination and garnered a wide variety of reactions. They are also expected to grow dramatically in the coming years.
item.dc:creator: Info World
